scripts.setup:windows: npm run setup:windows --prefix apps/pocketbase && npm run migrations:up --prefix apps/pocketbase
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm run dev --prefix apps/pocketbase" "node scripts/wait-for-port.mjs 127.0.0.1 8090 30000 && npm run dev --prefix apps/api" "node scripts/wait-for-port.mjs 127.0.0.1 8090 30000 && node scripts/wait-for-port.mjs 127.0.0.1 3001 30000 && npm run dev --prefix apps/web"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm run start --prefix apps/api" "npm run start --prefix apps/pocketbase"
scripts.lint: concurrently --raw "npm run lint --prefix apps/web" "npm run lint --prefix apps/api"
